name: Spiced Apple-Pear Butter
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 pounds Rome Beauty or other baking apples, peeled, cored, coarsely chopped
2 1/2 pounds pears, peeled, cored, coarsely chopped
1 cup apple cider or apple juice
1/3 cup firmly packed golden brown sugar
1 strip of orange peel (orange part only)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C). Position rack in center.
2. Combine apples and pears in a saucepan. Bring mixture to a boil.
3. Reduce heat, cover the pan, and simmer until fruit is very tender, about 15 minutes.
4. Puree the fruit mixture using a blender or food processor.
5. Mix in sugar, brown sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, and orange peel (if using).
6. Pour the mixture into an 8-inch square glass baking dish.
7. Bake uncovered for about 1 hour and 20 minutes, stirring occasionally until thickened and dark.
8. Remove from oven and discard the orange peel before serving.
